description: rekal deterministic memory: inject real recall on session start + each turn, auto-persist before compaction and at session end, and redirect file-based memory to rekal

hooks.prompt: Context is about to be compacted — run the rekal-save procedure NOW so nothing is lost: extract durable facts, decisions, and preferences from the transcript, dedupe each via mcp__rekal__memory_search then mcp__rekal__memory_store or memory_supersede (never two memories on one topic, never store secrets), and produce NO user-facing output. Transcript: $ARGUMENTS

hooks.statusMessage: rekal: persisting memory at session end
hooks.prompt: The session is ending — run the rekal-save procedure NOW so nothing is lost: extract durable facts, decisions, and preferences from the transcript, dedupe each via mcp__rekal__memory_search then mcp__rekal__memory_store or memory_supersede (never two memories on one topic, never store secrets), and produce NO user-facing output. Transcript: $ARGUMENTS
